summary: Soundboard recording of a mixed‑quality show – strong desire and delightful moments, but plagued by forgotten lyrics and out‑of‑tune vocals.
review: The performance has plenty of energy and many enjoyable passages, yet the band struggled with lyric slips and Bob Weir was noticeably off‑pitch after the space segment. Jerry Garcia also seemed unsure of his verses, which detracts from an otherwise good show. No specific recording issues are mentioned, suggesting a decent soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it highlights both positive and negative aspects of the performance while offering no clear recording‑quality feedback, leading to a cautious mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on audio quality; assumed clean soundboard capture given the file type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally solid set with good energy, but marred by lyrical lapses and off‑key moments that interrupt the flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Seems confused about verse order during some songs.
band_member_comments.Bob: Terribly out of tune after the space segment.
